rules.rule_text:
rule APT1_WARP
{
	meta:
		author = "AlienVault Labs"
		info = "CommentCrew-threat-apt1"

	strings:
		$err1 = "exception..." wide ascii
		$err2 = "failed..." wide ascii
		$err3 = "opened..." wide ascii
		$exe1 = "cmd.exe" wide ascii
		$exe2 = "ISUN32.EXE" wide ascii

	condition:
		2 of ( $err* ) and all of ( $exe* )
}
